1.description: fetch Trondheim municipality boundary by kommunenummer to avoid name mismatch

2.description: fetch quick-clay hazard areas intersecting Trondheim boundary

3.description: fetch parcels intersecting quick-clay hazard areas

4.description: join parcels with quick-clay areas to confirm intersection
